# Summary

## Phase / Issue

## Behavior Delivered

## Files Changed

## Tests And Commands Run

## Schema Or Migration Impact

## Accessibility Notes

## Security Notes

## Known Limitations

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md`, `specs.md`, `plan.md`, and relevant ADRs.
- [ ] The change stays within the active phase.
- [ ] Domain logic remains independent from FastAPI, React, PixiJS, and Ollama.
- [ ] LLM output remains schema-validated and never mutates project state directly.
- [ ] Project schema changes include migrations and fixtures, or no schema change was made.
- [ ] Tests cover normal, boundary, and invalid cases appropriate to the change.
- [ ] Documentation/checkpoints were updated with evidence where needed.
